title: Micradenia splendens
intro: Micradenia splendens, also known as Yellow Bird's Eye, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its bioactive constituents include flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Micradenia splendens is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to treat various ailments, making it a valuable resource for local communities.
